# Copilot Instructions

## Objective

Create a Personal Portfolio website for COMP 2068 Assignment 1 using Node.js, Express, and HBS views.

The website must have four pages:

- Home
- About Me
- Projects
- Contact Me

## Rules

- Use Express Generator project structure.
- Use HBS as the view engine.
- Use only one router file: routes/index.js.
- Define all routes inside routes/index.js.
- Keep all views inside the views folder.
- Each page must be a separate HBS view file.
- Use layout.hbs for the shared header, navigation, footer, CSS links, and Bootstrap links.
- Footer must include GitHub and LinkedIn links.
- Code must be committed and pushed using GitHub Desktop or Git Bash.
- Manual GitHub web uploads are not allowed.

## Personal Brand

Use a clean student developer portfolio style.

Preferred style:

- Blue primary colour
- Dark navbar
- White cards
- Simple readable font
- Professional layout for co-op and web development opportunities
